ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, fully legible. ICC Certificate of Origin with stamp and QR code.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, fully legible. Invoice issued by Elmo Sweden AB.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The references in box 5 are '2192308067 / 3192309445' which are delivery/order references, not LC references. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar was found.

consignor_search.search_notes: The certificate consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' is explicitly found in the invoice footer postal address block: 'Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN'. The Elmo brand logo also appears at the top of the invoice.

criteria_met: Consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' identified in invoice postal address block and as invoice issuer (criterion 2)
pairing_validation.reasoning: Criterion 2 is met: Certificate consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' can be identified in the invoice (postal address block and as the issuing entity). The document pair is valid. Note: The certificate references '2192308067 / 3192309445' in remarks, while the invoice has delivery nr. 2192306499 and reference 3192307408 — these do NOT match, but pairing is validated via consignor identification.

candidates.source: Certificate box 1 (implied from header 'SWEDEN' at bottom and address context)

candidates.raw_text: Al Muhalhel General Trading & Contracting Co
candidates.normalized_text: al muhalhel general trading and contracting co

candidates.raw_text: Al Ardhiya Ind. Area. Block: 1, Building: 81, 15257
candidates.normalized_text: al ardhiya ind. area. block: 1, building: 81, 15257

candidates.raw_text: Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH
candidates.normalized_text: boretius objekt nahservice fur dekorationen gmbh

candidates.normalized_text: boretius objekt nahservice fur dekorationen gmbh

candidates.source: Invoice product line Q-ty and Sales UoM

consignor.certificate_value: Elmo Sweden AB, Kyrkogatan 18, 51250, Svenljunga, SWEDEN
consignor.invoice_value: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN (postal address block)

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' found explicitly in invoice footer postal address block: 'Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN'. The invoice is also issued by/branded as 'elmo' (logo at top). This satisfies rule 4.1.0.
Country 'SWEDEN' explicitly stated in invoice postal address block. Additionally, VAT number SE556821587401 has SE prefix confirming Sweden. IBAN starts with SE. All confirm Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure - consignor name found in invoice postal address block
Country verification via indirect identifiers - SE prefix in VAT and IBAN

evidence.text: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Elmo Sweden AB' at Kyrkogatan 18, 51250 Svenljunga. Applying rule 4.1.0 (corporate structure): searched all invoice text for 'Elmo Sweden AB'. Found explicitly in the invoice footer postal address block: 'Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN'. The invoice is issued by this entity (brand 'elmo' in header, company details in footer). Country Sweden is confirmed by explicit 'SWEDEN' in the address block, VAT prefix 'SE', and IBAN prefix 'SE'. Name match is exact after normalization. Result: MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Al Muhalhel General Trading & Contracting Co, Al Ardhiya Ind. Area. Block: 1, Building: 81, 15257, KUWAIT
consignee.invoice_value: Payer: Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH, Südring 4, DE 76473 - Iffezheim, Germany; Ship-to: Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH, Südring 4, DE 76473 - Iffezheim, Germany

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate consignee matches invoice Payer field
comparison_steps.details: Invoice Payer is 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH' in Iffezheim, Germany. Certificate consignee is 'Al Muhalhel General Trading & Contracting Co' in Kuwait. These are completely different entities in different countries.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate consignee matches invoice Ship-to field
comparison_steps.details: Invoice Ship-to is 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH' in Iffezheim, Germany. Certificate consignee is 'Al Muhalhel General Trading & Contracting Co' in Kuwait. Completely different entity and country.

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.1 - Search all invoice fields for consignee name
comparison_steps.description: Search entire invoice for 'Al Muhalhel' or any reference to the certificate consignee
comparison_steps.details: Searched entire invoice text for 'Al Muhalhel', 'Muhalhel', 'Kuwait', 'Contracting'. None of these terms appear anywhere in the invoice. The certificate consignee cannot be identified in any field of the invoice.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification - primary billing field checked first
Special rules - searched all invoice fields including delivery, receiver, dealer, importer
MATCH/MISMATCH determination - consignee not identifiable in invoice

evidence.text: Al Muhalhel General Trading & Contracting Co, Al Ardhiya Ind. Area. Block: 1, Building: 81, 15257, KUWAIT
Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH, Südring 4, DE 76473 - Iffezheim, Germany
Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH, Südring 4, DE 76473 - Iffezheim, Germany

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Al Muhalhel General Trading & Contracting Co' in Kuwait. Invoice Payer (primary billing field per 4.2.0.2) is 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH' in Germany. Ship-to is the same German entity. Full text search of entire invoice found no reference to 'Al Muhalhel', 'Kuwait', or any part of the consignee's name. The entities are completely different — different names, different countries (Kuwait vs Germany). No normalization rule can bridge this gap. This is a clear MISMATCH: the certificate consignee cannot be identified in the invoice at all.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Could the Kuwaiti company be a subsidiary or related entity of the German company?
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.2 explicitly prohibits assumptions about corporate relationships, agent relationships, or trading relationships. No evidence in the invoice links these entities.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Could this be a different invoice than intended for this certificate?
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The document pair was provided as-is. The invoice references (2192306499 / 3192307408) do not match the certificate remarks (2192308067 / 3192309445), further suggesting these documents may not belong together. However, per rule 8.6 the pairing validation passed on consignor criterion, so verification proceeds. The consignee mismatch stands on its own merits.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains explicit article numbers for matching
comparison_steps.details: The certificate contains product code '97001' as part of 'Elmobaltique 97001 Basket Weave I'. The invoice contains product code '2100104202' and comm. code '41071291'. The certificate's '97001' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. However, the primary product identification is via the product name, not a standalone article number field.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 - Priority 2: Controlled text matching - identify main designation
comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate
comparison_steps.details: Certificate main designation: 'Elmobaltique 97001 Basket Weave I'. This is the product identity. Invoice product: 'ELMOSOFT 97038 I'. The product names are fundamentally different: 'Elmobaltique' vs 'ELMOSOFT' — these are different product lines/brands. The product codes are different: '97001' vs '97038'. The descriptive suffix differs: 'Basket Weave I' vs just 'I'. The identity-bearing main designation 'Elmobaltique 97001 Basket Weave' cannot be identified in the invoice. 'ELMOSOFT 97038' is a different product entirely.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation - 'Elmobaltique 97001 Basket Weave I' vs 'ELMOSOFT 97038 I' are different products
MATCH/MISMATCH - goods description cannot be verified without semantic interpretation

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate describes goods as 'Elmobaltique 97001 Basket Weave I'. Invoice describes goods as 'ELMOSOFT 97038 I'. These are clearly different products: 'Elmobaltique' and 'ELMOSOFT' are different product line names (both under the Elmo brand), '97001' and '97038' are different product codes, and 'Basket Weave' is absent from the invoice description. Per rule 4.3.3, the identity-bearing main designation must be identifiable in the invoice without semantic interpretation. 'Elmobaltique 97001 Basket Weave I' cannot be identified in the invoice text. This is not a formatting or normalization issue — these are fundamentally different products. MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Both products are from the Elmo brand family, so they could be treated as the same goods
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.3.3 explicitly prohibits semantic interpretation, synonym matching, and industry-based interpretation. 'Elmobaltique' and 'ELMOSOFT' are different words/product names, not normalization variants.

comparison_steps.details: Certificate quantity from box 7: '288,610 M2'. Analyzing the comma: in European notation, '288,610' could mean 288.610 (288 and 610 thousandths) which is approximately 288.61 M2. Alternatively with comma as thousands separator it could be 288610 M2. Given the European context of the certificate (Swedish issuer) and the magnitude, 288.610 M2 (~288.61 square meters) is the most reasonable reading.

comparison_steps.description: Search for '288.610' or '288610' or '288,610' in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice quantity for the product line is '4,850 M2' (4.850 M2, i.e., 4.85 square meters). Neither '288.610' nor '288610' nor any close variant appears in the invoice. The values are fundamentally different: ~288.61 M2 vs ~4.85 M2.

3A: Only one invoice, not applicable. 3B: Both values already in M2, no unit conversion needed. 3C: Not a unit weight scenario. 3D: Only one product row in invoice. 3E: No row weights to sum. No exception applies. The numerical values are simply different.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check - certificate quantity 288,610 M2 not found in invoice (invoice shows 4,850 M2)
MATCH/MISMATCH - numerical value cannot be identified in invoice

evidence.source: Invoice Q-ty and Sales UoM columns

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '288,610 M2'. Invoice product line shows '4,850 M2'. These are entirely different quantities regardless of comma interpretation. Certificate ~288.61 M2 (or even 288,610 M2 if thousands separator) vs invoice ~4.85 M2. No exception (3A-3E) can bridge this gap. The numerical value from the certificate cannot be identified in the invoice. MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Could '288,610' be interpreted as 288610 M2 (comma as thousands separator)?
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Even if interpreted as 288,610 M2 with comma as thousands separator (288610 M2), this value does not appear in the invoice either. The invoice shows only 4,850 M2. The mismatch is clear regardless of interpretation.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin indication in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice contains 'Swedish Origin' in the goods detail section. This is an explicit origin statement.

Certificate states 'EUROPEAN UNION'. Invoice states 'Swedish Origin' meaning Sweden. Sweden (SE) is an EU member state (EU-27). Per rule 4.5.4.2: if certificate states 'EU/European Union' and invoice states a specific EU member state → verified. Sweden is in the EU-27 list. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: EU member state normalization - certificate says 'European Union', invoice says 'Swedish Origin' (Sweden is EU member) → verified
MATCH - origin explicitly identifiable in invoice after EU normalization

origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'EUROPEAN UNION'. Invoice states 'Swedish Origin' in the goods detail section. Per rule 4.5.4.2: when certificate states 'EU'/'European Union'/'European Community' and invoice states a specific EU member state, this is verified. Sweden is an EU-27 member state. The origin is verified. No non-EU origins are present in the invoice. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate.
Criterion 2 met: consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' identified in invoice postal address block.
Consignor name found explicitly in invoice footer.
Sweden confirmed via explicit address, VAT SE-prefix, IBAN SE-prefix.
Invoice Payer is 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH' in Germany. Certificate consignee is 'Al Muhalhel General Trading & Contracting Co' in Kuwait. No match.
Certificate consignee 'Al Muhalhel' does not appear in any Ship-to or delivery field in the invoice.
No reference to 'Al Muhalhel' or Kuwait found anywhere in invoice.
'Elmobaltique 97001 Basket Weave I' vs 'ELMOSOFT 97038 I' — different product names and codes.
288,610 M2 not identifiable in invoice (invoice shows 4,850 M2).
Only one invoice in document pair.
Both values in M2, no MT/KG conversion relevant.
Only one product row in invoice.
Certificate: European Union. Invoice: Swedish Origin (Sweden = EU member). Verified.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet och fakturan avser olika mottagare, olika produkter och olika kvantiteter. Certifikatet anger mottagaren 'Al Muhalhel General Trading & Contracting Co' i Kuwait medan fakturan är ställd till 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH' i Tyskland. Certifikatet avser produkten 'Elmobaltique 97001 Basket Weave I' med kvantiteten 288,610 M2, men fakturan avser 'ELMOSOFT 97038 I' med kvantiteten 4,850 M2. Det verkar som att fel faktura har bifogats till certifikatet.

summary_of_mismatches.description: Certificate consignee 'Al Muhalhel General Trading & Contracting Co' (Kuwait) not found in invoice. Invoice is addressed to 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH' (Germany).
Certificate describes 'Elmobaltique 97001 Basket Weave I' but invoice describes 'ELMOSOFT 97038 I' — different products.
Certificate quantity 288,610 M2 not identifiable in invoice (invoice shows 4,850 M2).

blocking_issues: Consignee MISMATCH: completely different entity and country
Goods description MISMATCH: different product names and codes
Quantity MISMATCH: entirely different numerical values

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.invoice_value: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN (postal address block)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – consignor-namn identifierat i fakturans postadressblock
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Elmo Sweden AB' återfinns explicit i fakturans postadressblock och som fakturautställare. Land Sverige bekräftas av explicit 'SWEDEN' i adressblocket, VAT-prefix SE och IBAN-prefix SE. Exakt namnmatchning efter normalisering. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: Al Muhalhel General Trading & Contracting Co, Al Ardhiya Ind. Area. Block: 1, Building: 81, 15257, KUWAIT
sections.invoice_value: Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH, Südring 4, DE 76473 - Iffezheim, Germany
sections.rule_applied: Mottagaren i certifikatet kan inte identifieras i fakturan (4.2.4)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Al Muhalhel General Trading & Contracting Co' i Kuwait kan inte återfinnas någonstans i fakturan. Fakturans betalare och leveransadress anger 'Boretius Objekt Nähservice für Dekorationen GmbH' i Tyskland. Det är helt olika företag i helt olika länder. Ingen del av mottagarnamnet eller landet Kuwait förekommer i fakturan. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning kan ej identifieras i fakturan (4.3.3)
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger produkten 'Elmobaltique 97001 Basket Weave I'. Fakturan anger 'ELMOSOFT 97038 I'. 'Elmobaltique' och 'ELMOSOFT' är olika produktlinjer. Produktkoderna '97001' och '97038' är olika. 'Basket Weave' saknas helt i fakturan. Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen kan inte identifieras i fakturan. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Numeriskt värde kan ej identifieras i fakturan (4.4.1)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet i box 7 är '288,610 M2'. Fakturans kvantitet är '4,850 M2'. Oavsett tolkning av kommatecken (288.610 M2 eller 288610 M2) kan inget av dessa värden identifieras i fakturan. Undantagen 3A–3E är ej tillämpliga. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering – certifikat anger EU, faktura anger EU-medlemsstat Sverige (4.5.4.2)
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland 'EUROPEAN UNION'. Fakturan anger 'Swedish Origin' (Sverige). Sverige är EU-medlemsstat. Enligt regel 4.5.4.2 anses detta verifierat när certifikatet anger EU och fakturan anger ett specifikt EU-medlemsland. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: Three checkpoints (consignee, goods_description, quantity) have status MISMATCH. comparison_result is correctly set to NOT_IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation is correctly set to MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED. No inconsistencies detected between motivations and statuses.
